testsRun.command: authenticated prod full sweep with temporary runtime env

node --check server.js bookings.js client.js site-init.js stars-v2.js theme-chrono.js pricing-config.js otp-attribution.js scripts/prod_bootstrap_qa.js scripts/prod_full_sweep.js scripts/prod_sweep_v2_runner.js scripts/prod_terminal_sweep.js scripts/verify_release_scope.js

browserQa.summary: Local patched QA passed desktop dark/light and mobile dark/light homepage with mounted canvas stars, clean hero pseudo-layer, no checkerboard, ELI3GANT-only identity, Enter Vault present, no console errors, and no overflow. Adaptive performance mode activated on desktop; sampled headless FPS was 54.9 dark, 52.2 light, 60.4 mobile dark, and 60.4 mobile light. Booking mobile Fast Lane clicks stayed on Step 1; Same-Day Reel and Event Promo mapped to The Signal, Business Content Pack to The Engine, and Brand Launch Pack to Custom Build. Mocked submit preserved source tracking, selected_fast_offer, and fast_lane_package.

authenticatedSweep.summary: Temporary Vercel production env pull used for runtime-only auth; E2E_TEST_MODE=true prod full sweep passed admin QA, knowledge, docs templates, schema migration, and terminal smoke checks. Temp env material deleted.
